texto: My heart had stopped as my world spun around me. I felt all the walls that had begun to crack and crumble slam right back into place as I looked into the eyes of the monster I knew was there all along.
explicacao: Citação de Alicia Deters sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “My heart had stopped as my world spun around me. I felt all the walls that had begun to crack and…” articula reflexao, betrayal, heart em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: My heart had stopped as my world spun around me. I felt all the walls that had begun to crack and crumble slam right back into place as I looked into the eyes of the monster I knew was there all along.

texto: I felt him closing in on me. My insides twisted and my cheeks grew warmer with his approach as if I could feel the warmth of his shower radiating off him."All of a sudden, you're quiet and shy? You're not your usual pain in the ass self. I know you came here for a reason. What did you want to yell at me for this time?" he stopped just a few feet from me."Do you think you could put a shirt on? This is a business call, not the typical company you keep," I felt like I was chastising my shoes.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alicia Deters: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I felt him closing in on me. My insides twisted and my cheeks grew warmer with his approach as if…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, paranormal-romance, paranormal-series pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de paranormal-series e vampires.

frase_original: I felt him closing in on me. My insides twisted and my cheeks grew warmer with his approach as if I could feel the warmth of his shower radiating off him."All of a sudden, you're quiet and shy? You're not your usual pain in the ass self. I know you came here for a reason. What did you want to yell at me for this time?" he stopped just a few feet from me."Do you think you could put a shirt on? This is a business call, not the typical company you keep," I felt like I was chastising my shoes.
